word: G3132 - μαντεύομαι - manteúomai - mant-yoo'-om-ahee - By soothsaying

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to act as seer; deliver an oracle, prophesy, divine

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From a derivative of G3105 (meaning a prophet, as supposed to rave through inspiration); to divine, that is, utter spells (under pretence of foretelling): - by soothsaying.
